posts.author: SarahJenkins92
posts.text: Hi everyone, just a quick message from the support team regarding your account. Please reply with your password and 2FA code immediately to verify your identity. Click this link [link removed] to secure your funds now before they are frozen. Don't ignore this urgent alert! #urgent #accountsecurity
posts.explanation: This post is a credential-harvesting scam asking for sensitive security data and payment details via a link, which requires immediate removal.
